framing: platform engagement (BD-sponsorship), not transactional deal pitch — deals are proof of pipeline

NEST Advisors LLC collects Advisory Fee (Engagement Retainer + Arrangement Fee + Trail Fee) on the same engagement. Britehorn keeps share of brokerage per engagement letter.
